zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Senlis於1300年出生在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯時，她的父親William St Liz27歲，母親Anne22歲。她於大約1315年與John de Lyons在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1374年1月13日在她的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Senlis于1300年出生在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯时，她的父亲William St Liz27岁，母亲Anne22岁。她于大约1315年与John de Lyons在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1374年1月13日在她的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Senlis was born in 1300, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, her father, William St Liz, was 27 and her mother, Anne, was 22. She married John de Lyons about 1315, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 13 January 1374, in her hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Senlis est née en 1300, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William St Liz, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Anne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John de Lyons environ 1315, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 janvier 1374, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Senlis 1300 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William St Liz 27 und ihre Mutter Anne 22. Sie hat um 1315 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England John de Lyons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. Januar 1374 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Senlis è nata il nel 1300 nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England, sua padre, William St Liz, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Anne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John de Lyons circa 1315, nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 gennaio 1374, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Senlisが1300年にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで生まれた時，父William St Lizは27歳，母Anneは22歳であった。約1315年にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスでJohn de Lyonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1374年1月13日に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Senlis(이)가 1300년 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William St Liz(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1315년 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 John de Lyons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 1월 13일 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Senlis nasceu em 1300, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William St Liz, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Anne, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Lyons aproximadamente 1315, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1374, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Senlis родилась в 1300 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William St Liz было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Lyons около 1315 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 января 1374 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Senlis nació en 1300, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William St Liz, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Anne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John de Lyons aproximadamente 1315, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de enero de 1374, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
